name: Maternity Benefit Act, 1961
officialCitation: The Maternity Benefit Act, 1961 (Act No. 53 of 1961), repealed and saved under section 164 of the Code on Social Security, 2020.
overview: Historical central labour-law record governing maternity benefit and employment protection before the Code on Social Security, 2020 became operative on 21 November 2025. The Maternity Benefit Act, 1961 was repealed under section 164 of the Code, subject to repeal-and-savings provisions. Current maternity-benefit obligations must be assessed under Chapter VI of the Code on Social Security, 2020 and the applicable Central, State or Union Territory rules and notifications. This record is retained for historical periods, saved rules and notifications, accrued rights and benefits, pending claims and proceedings, prior exemptions and audit traceability.

authority.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India

definitions.definition: A woman employed in an establishment covered under the Act.
The establishment responsible for compliance under the Act.
Benefit payable in accordance with the provisions of the Act.

rules.title: Review Applicability of the Maternity Benefit Act
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment is covered under the Maternity Benefit Act.

rules.title: Provide Statutory Maternity Benefit
rules.description: Provide maternity benefits to eligible employees in accordance with the Act.

rules.title: Protect Employment During Maternity
rules.description: Ensure statutory protection against unlawful dismissal or disadvantage during maternity.

rules.title: Maintain Required Records
rules.description: Maintain records required under the Act and applicable rules.

rules.title: Communicate Maternity Rights
rules.description: Inform eligible employees about statutory maternity rights and available benefits.

exceptions.title: Eligibility Conditions
exceptions.description: Eligibility for maternity benefits depends on the statutory conditions prescribed under the Act.

exceptions.title: Repeal and Savings
exceptions.description: Rules, notifications, exemptions, accrued rights, benefits, claims, proceedings and actions under the repealed Act continue only to the extent preserved by section 164 of the Code on Social Security, 2020 and section 6 of the General Clauses Act, 1897.

recommendations.title: Retain Historical Maternity Records
recommendations.description: Preserve eligibility, service, notice, medical, payment, leave, crèche, dismissal-protection, claim and proceeding records created under the repealed Act for saved rights and audit traceability.

recommendations.title: Use the Social Security Code Record for Current Compliance
recommendations.description: Assess maternity-benefit obligations arising on or after 21 November 2025 under CENTRAL-SOCIAL-SECURITY and the applicable Central, State or Union Territory rules and notifications.

sources.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment Labour Codes Portal
sources.authority: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India

sources.name: Maternity Benefit Act, 1961 and Code on Social Security, 2020
sources.authority: Legislative Department, Ministry of Law and Justice, Government of India

governance.changeSummary: Updated the Maternity Benefit Act record as a superseded historical record, preserved its existing definitions, rule identifiers and eligibility exception, documented repeal-and-savings treatment, and linked current maternity-benefit compliance to the Code on Social Security, 2020 from 21 November 2025.
